name: 季米特里斯·阿瑟里迪斯
name_full: 季米特里斯·阿瑟里迪斯 Dimitris Athiridis

last_movies.title: 刻印：关于第14届卡塞尔文献展
T 4 Trouble and the Self Admiration Society

introduction: The documentary filmmaker and photographer comes from Thessaloniki in Greece. After breaking off a degree in engineering, he worked as a photographer and cinematographer in advertising. His work as a filmmaker is dedicated to character studies. His films include T4 Trouble and the Self Admiration Society, an exploration of the enigmatic life of rock anti-hero Terry Papadinas, and One Step Ahead, about iconoclastic winemaker Giannis Boutaris as he challenged the political establishment by running for mayor of Thessaloniki.
